mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.cover_image, p.material, p.moq, p.price_hint, p.is_visible, p.sort_order, p.create_time, c.name AS category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.id DESC
SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT spec_label AS label, spec_value AS value FROM product_spec WHERE product_id = #{id} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT id, image_url AS imageUrl, label, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM product_image WHERE product_id = #{id} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (category_id, name, cover_image, image_keyword, material, moq, price_hint, description, is_visible, sort_order, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{coverImage}, #{imageKeyword}, #{material}, #{moq}, #{priceHint}, #{description}, #{isVisible}, #{sortOrder}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

INSERT INTO product_spec (product_id, spec_label, spec_value, sort_order) VALUES
(#{productId}, #{s.specLabel}, #{s.specValue}, #{s.sortOrder})

INSERT INTO product_image (product_id, image_url, label, sort_order) VALUES
(#{productId}, #{img.imageUrl}, #{img.label}, #{img.sortOrder})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM product WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.category_id, p.name, p.cover_image AS image, p.image_keyword AS imageKeyword, p.material, p.moq, p.price_hint, c.name AS category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id
p.is_visible = 1
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.id DESC
